config.seed_text: A forgotten machine beneath the sea continued speaking long after its makers were gone. Each repetition made its message stranger, denser, and more self-aware.

model.notes: Direct continuation of the current repo's GPT-2 lineage.

records.output_text: This is what most people mean when they say that their computer system has been programmed for millennia before it can learn or replicate this world's past data structure (for any human who did so); however such an assumption could easily be extended by reading something else from above while simultaneously thinking about your own current state; no matter how many times you have tried—or failed! What if all these things had happened? Now would there be one way out on our path toward learning new languages with better algorithms than we know today? It just might happen again….This solution comes through writing another variable token called EOM
